replicaCount.description: This will set the replicaset count more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/replicaset/

pullPolicy.description: This sets the pull policy for images.

tag.description: Overrides the image tag whose default is the chart appVersion.

image.description: This sets the container image more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images/

imagePullSecrets.description: This is for the secretes for pulling an image from a private repository more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/pull-image-private-registry/

nameOverride.description: This is to override the chart name.

create.description: Specifies whether a service account should be created

automount.description: Automatically mount a ServiceAccount's API credentials?

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account

name.description:
The name of the service account to use.
If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

serviceAccount.description: This section builds out the service account more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/security/service-accounts/

podAnnotations.description:
This is for setting Kubernetes Annotations to a Pod.
For more information checkout: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/annotations/

podLabels.description:
This is for setting Kubernetes Labels to a Pod.
For more information checkout: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/labels/

type.description: This sets the service type more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/service/#publishing-services-service-types

port.description: This sets the ports more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/service/#field-spec-ports

service.description: This is for setting up a service more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/service/

ingress.description: This block is for setting up the ingress for more information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/ingress/

livenessProbe.description: More information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/configure-liveness-readiness-startup-probes/

autoscaling.description: More information can be found here: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/autoscaling/

volumes.description: Additional volumes on the output Deployment definition.

volumeMounts.description: Additional volumeMounts on the output Deployment definition.
